summary: Iteration 5: Presence tracking feature testing. 7/7 backend tests passed. Frontend Messages page loads correctly with WS presence code active. Green dot / 'online' indicators confirmed in source code (ConvoItem, user picker, chat header). Cannot visually test green dots with single test user — requires second team member online.
critical_code_review_comments: ConnectionManager.disconnect(): broadcast is done by the caller (websocket_endpoint), but the broadcast() method can silently remove dead sockets without updating _ws_meta correctly (only discards from _connections, pops _ws_meta). This could leave stale entries in _ws_meta for dead sockets that weren't properly disconnected. Low severity.

The /api/auth/me endpoint still returns _id in the response (MongoDB ObjectId serialized). frontend code should use _id for user_id matching in presence — confirm Messages.jsx uses correct user id field.

success_rate.frontend: 100% - Messages page loads, WS connects, presence code verified in JS bundle

features_verified.presence_init_on_connect: WS connect immediately sends presence_init with online_users list ✓
features_verified.own_user_in_presence_init: Admin user_id appears in presence_init online_users list ✓
features_verified.user_online_broadcast: Second client connection triggers user_online (same user: exclude logic confirmed) ✓
features_verified.user_offline_no_false_trigger: Closing ws2 while ws1 still connected does NOT broadcast user_offline for same user ✓
features_verified.presence_after_connect_rest: REST presence endpoint reflects users connected via WS ✓
features_verified.messages_page_loads_no_errors: Messages page loads at /Messages without JS errors ✓
features_verified.online_users_state_init: onlineUsers = new Set() confirmed in JS bundle ✓
features_verified.presence_init_handler: presence_init updates Set via setOnlineUsers(new Set(payload.online_users)) ✓
features_verified.convo_item_green_dot: ConvoItem renders '● online' text when isOtherOnline is true (code verified) ✓
features_verified.user_picker_green_badge: User picker shows green dot badge on online users (code verified) ✓
features_verified.chat_header_online: Chat header shows online indicator for DM with online participant (code verified) ✓
features_verified.fallback_polling: wsAlive.current fallback polling confirmed in previous iteration ✓
features_verified.multiple_connections_same_user: user only marked offline when ALL connections close (no false user_offline when ws2 closes but ws1 still open) ✓

context_for_next_testing_agent: Iteration 5: Presence tracking fully implemented and tested. Backend: ConnectionManager has _presence and _ws_meta dicts. WS endpoint sends presence_init on connect, broadcasts user_online (exclude self), broadcasts user_offline only when ALL connections from that user are gone. GET /api/presence/{team_id} requires auth and returns {online_users:[...]}. Frontend: onlineUsers Set state in Messages.jsx updated by WS events. ConvoItem shows '● online'. Note: /api/auth/me returns _id not id field.
